creator: admin@vladiom.com.ua
text:
Hi!
I have 3 hard drive (8 TB) with file system zfs, 
but Webmin wrong show local disk space in the "System Information"!

Webmin show:
Local disk space 3.37 TB used, 5.27 TB total

Real size:
# zpool list
NAME    SIZE  ALLOC   FREE  EXPANDSZ   FRAG    CAP  DEDUP  HEALTH  ALTROOT
dc     3,62T  2,43T  1,19T         -    31%    67%  1.00x  ONLINE  -
dc2    1,81T   964G   892G         -    18%    51%  1.00x  ONLINE  -
zroot  1,80T   198G  1,60T         -     7%    10%  1.00x  ONLINE  -

All disks mounted.

The developers Webmin say, that they have displayed "Local disk space" correctly!
Quote:
"Based on your files and the Webmin code, it should be showing the full 8 TB of disk."

What could be the problem?

Someone else has a similar problem?
